## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] New icon
- [ ] Fix to an existing icon or animation
- [ ] Gallery or site change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Related issues

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes with no errors.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes with no errors.
- [ ] New or changed icons are drawn on the Phosphor 256 grid and read clearly
      at 24px.
- [ ] New or changed icons reuse the shared `useHover` controller and motion
      tokens.
- [ ] New or changed icons animate on both hover and keyboard focus.
- [ ] The registry index and icon metadata are updated where needed.

## Screenshots or recordings

If this changes how an icon looks or moves, add a screenshot or a short screen
recording of the animation.
